title: Squirrel Removal in Fordham, Bronx | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Fordham, Bronx. Humane extraction, entry point sealing & attic cleanup. Serving Fordham University area & nearby homes. Call today!
intro: Squirrels are a common sight in Fordham's tree-lined streets, but when they invade your attic or walls, they can cause serious damage to insulation, wiring, and structural components. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Fordham, from the historic homes near Fordham University to the residential buildings along Webster Avenue. Our humane removal process includes live trapping, exclusion repairs, and thorough cleanup to protect your property.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Fordham and the greater Bronx, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique wildlife challenges facing this vibrant neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use proven, humane methods and provide guaranteed results with same-day emergency service available for Fordham residents.
localContext: Fordham's mature trees near the Botanical Garden and along Arthur Avenue create ideal habitats for squirrels, which frequently seek shelter in the attics of nearby Victorian homes and brick apartment buildings. The area's mix of older architecture and dense urban development makes professional exclusion work essential to prevent recurring squirrel intrusions.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Fordham typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup services. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Fordham properties.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Fordham home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible entry holes near your roofline, chewed wood or wires, squirrel droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. Fordham's older homes are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through deteriorated soffits and roof vents.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Fordham humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York City wildlife regulations. We safely capture and relocate squirrels, then seal all entry points to prevent their return. Our approach prioritizes the wellbeing of the animals while effectively protecting your Fordham property from damage.

faqs.question: How long does the squirrel removal process take in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Fordham are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and accessibility of entry points. The initial inspection and trap placement occur on day one, with follow-up visits to check traps and perform exclusion work. We continue monitoring until all squirrels are removed and your home is fully secured.
